title: Convolution, Step by Step
tagline: Watch a kernel slide across an image, one dot product at a time
summary: Pick a 3×3 kernel — edge detector, sharpen, blur, or your own — and step through a convolution one position at a time. See the input region highlighted, the element-wise products inside the kernel, and the output feature map building up. Adjust padding and stride live. This is the mechanics of every CNN, laid bare.
highlights: Five preset kernels — horizontal edge, vertical edge, sharpen, blur, and a fully editable custom 3×3.
Step / Play / Reset controls let you walk through one dot product at a time or watch the kernel sweep the image in real time.
The middle panel shows the exact input × kernel products at the current position — the arithmetic of convolution, not an abstraction.
Padding slider (0–2) and stride selector (1–2) — watch the output grid resize live as you adjust them.
Live KaTeX rendering of the output dimension formula with actual numbers: O = ⌊(W − K + 2P)/S⌋ + 1.
